Even on short notice, they fit me in the next week. They showed up early, finished just after lunch, and cleaned everything up. I wasn’t able to be there during the work, but they were completely trustworthy and even reinstalled the missing siding they found in the shed — without me asking.

Fast, reliable, and top-quality work. Highly recommended!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mary","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKFbK_khogCV-Mxp2f3AufPQUw5rA-yREDWXLkotCmeXWw7aw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I am a Petawawa resident, i highly reccomend Jim's T&R construction for roofing. Finding a roofer was tough enough, totally exhausting actually and a good friend mentioned Jim's. Never heard of them before so i googled..
Well, from meeting with Jim till the job was finished was 7 days and totally stress free. Jim's crew did my roof in a day, which was Monday the 28th July, one of the hottest days this summer. The 2 man crew were kind, respectful and very easy to communicate with.
Thank You to Jim and his team.
1000% highly reccomend. Not to mention, VERY AFFORDABLE...","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sarah M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKE3APdOaLOwfNogotaTstwWg8cS856cz7rUC7uheLH1YrG0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"DO NOT use this company. They do not warranty their work and they dont give a damn if something goes wrong after. They did not replace the flashing on my roof. Water literally started drizzling down one of my walls a few months later. When I called he was rude and said it was ice build up (wouldnt even come check). I did not know what to do so i climbed up on the roof and sprayed flex seal around every pipe, chimney, etc.. It stopped leaking for a year. Now the water continues to drizzle down the wall and our asbestos in the attic is at risk of coming down with the ceiling. Another company took a video and told us our roof was not properly done. I was so nice to the guys, I left out drinks and did a timmies run for them. I just kind of trusted it was done right, I dont know enough about roofing. Now im suffering the consequenses of not doing my research. Do not use them!!!!

To your response... why on earth would I climb into my asbestos attic??? I climbed on the roof, took the snow off and sprayed everything on the roof. If it temporarily fixed the water leak that is a workmanship problem. Is the quote and payment cheque not enough to prove I hired you? Wow","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICH1JjKdg&fid=0x0:0x16ec30fbd8d92faa"],"When":"2024-9-1"},{"Name":"Katrina T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_T70JeGjj_0YcxdiCeArzVIRs4XidNnc1mxrPBThFk9kozAI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dealing with Jim's T&R Construction was a positive, efficient, and affordable experience. Jim and his skilled crew helped to solve our roof's venting issue as well as re-shingle the house and garage. Everything was clearly communicated throughout the process and all questions were welcomed and answered.When the work was completed, the only evidence left behind was the quality work—everything else was tidied up and disposed of by the company. We paid exactly what we were quoted.  If you are looking for good value as well as personable service, then call Jim's T&R Construction.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Stefanie Manton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnfzUKaZxnCtAla6YxkHSSnJQcKg5GdbWV0G_vZ0KLjBrp6b9D=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I first met Eric at Bigfoot roofing 2 years ago when I was gathering quotes to get my roof replaced. When he and his crew did the roof, it was a job well maintained, cleaning up as they went along. I was very pleased with the new roof, but more importantly, how I was treated as a client. I’m confident recommending them and will continue to do so!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"PATRICK HOULIHAN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQSsn8orCDEt1n9JVsz7oiYyOb9BSeTiPSfBwNtC_ZfReOD-I1=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Needed to have a roof replaced so down the rabbit hole I went, I can save you some time just call Eric at Bigfoot Roofing you won't be disappointed. I did have 3 other quotes from other roofers and his quote was the best. I was impressed with this young man from the moment he arrived for my estimate, he was professional and polite. I received his quote that night and after I decided on his company the communication on timing and supplies was spot on, constant texts, I was never left wondering what's going on. Eric and his crew arrived as promised, hit it hard for 2 days and busted off 3 old layers of roofing so we could start with a new solid base. I had Bigfoot Roofing install a bitumen roof on a bad pitch that has always been an issue with our ancestral home, and the results are awesome it looks fantastic. We highly recommend Eric and his crew, 5 star all the way.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDz78v0bQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x477103fdb98624cb"],"When":"2024-6-13"},{"Name":"Maxine Ross","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXiE7f6ePLC44T9zTbCC_LDkuEvTgU1gm9Pq3ifZmvVBM5tLzXC=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Outstanding service. Eric pays attention to the details that a client wants, communication, detailed bill, and shows up when he says he will be there. I booked late in the fall and he got my roof on before the season ended. Nothing but positives with Eric and his crew. A company that delivers!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Melanie Bertrand","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlOqJ5KTAIIkYY7kTf9LsZyyt3kqOK905zlQDPLq4u7Oj6z71Csw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Eric and his crew replaced the roof on my 2 story century home.  The roof is very steep and the work included removing the deteriorating chimney.  The crew of 5 was efficient and well prepared to complete the installation of asphalt shingles safely.  Everyone was polite, professional and patient when answering any questions I had.  Clean up was extraordinary and my property was left better than when they arrived.  I would not hesitate to recommend Bigfoot Roofing, thank you Eric!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCI8ZGvYg\u0026fid=0x0:0x477103fdb98624cb"],"When":"2025-4-2"},{"Name":"Denise Green","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJp2g0qEljYIcgw-7Ge7OZvfd_nb31p-kEG2AvgJNUHT9C4-g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This business definitely worth 5+ stars! The whole crew was friendly, very hard working, and put in long days, even with the chilly temperatures at the end of November! (We enjoyed listening to their tunes and hearing the laughter while they worked). They make a difficult job look so easy! Great job guys, highly recommend! 👍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDPnuys3QE\u0026fid=0x0:0x477103fdb98624cb"],"When":"2024-12-2"},{"Name":"Marg Roche","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqKblbtw8VOO2hCWSDK1bWWz9b1WgqT1Dtu0HtBOzH38lPPg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend Bigfoot roofing from Pembroke. Eric gave me an estimate the next day after contact. His crew introduced themselves, we're so polite and efficient. The work was done in two days including clean up and everyone knew their job and worked as a team. Eric promptly answered my questions and any concerns. Definitely the right choice for me.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"H SB","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI60pnOurwdRD8mRfJl959G-CzzesHFuCcTMK4u9bpaQ1e0xg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We wish we could give six stars! If you’re looking for a roof, look no further. We had multiple quotes and Bigfoot Roofing was by far the most affordable. Eric was also the only roofing contractor who went on the roof to provide that quote to ensure there were no soft Spots or any hiccups not visible from the ground. Eric came in the fall and gave us a quote and said he would start in the spring, we are now the first week of April and the roof is done. We are a townhouse complex of five units and Eric offered an incentive for everyone to get their roof done! So, if you are commercial or multi residential, I would definitely start here. If you are a single-family home owner, this is your stop as well. The crew were very professional and friendly, communication was Impeccable, and the cleanup was very impressive. All were professional and knowledgeable. Thank you Done-Right Construction and Renovations.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDv5M6i3wE&fid=0x0:0x82345a85ef4cd730"],"When":"2024-12-17"},{"Name":"Peter Niemczak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLofR5uz9amQpwhLsMzxos_nztr_EHn9sW2Qllxi6zh9bK-kg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"To begin with, our overall experience was a positive one.

The design process for the two car garage and pottery studio was fairly simply and clear.  We understood the impact of our decisions and came away with a design we were happy with.  The estimated cost was more than we had originally planned to spend, but we chose several options that ultimately increased our happiness with the building.

Once construction began, we were very impressed with the subcontractors who contributed to the project. These individual companies were great.  Combine these with the staff from Done-Right Construction (Scott and Bill) and they gave us a build quality that was second to none. The quality of the workmanship was truly impressive.

The build took longer than was originally planned owing to supply chain issues and weather, all things beyond our control.

Finally. having to pay for the build as you go was a great way to move forward with a project like this, rather than two or three really large payments.

Like any construction project there were hiccups along the way, but when they did arise Scott and Malcolm were able to take care of them for us.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jessica Coakwell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI7Eo8ZOD8Zekjhk92-e3hYYxGBm8p2HOv7h7Hrr6c0ldY3Kg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a wonderful experience adding an upper level and basement addition to our home. Live-in renovations aren’t for the faint of heart, especially with two young kids but the Done-Right team made it as seamless as could be.

All the employees we met were friendly, responsive, professional and knowledgeable.The two Foremen we worked with (Scott and Miles) answered any and all questions right away and worked to accommodate the needs of the job. Kristyn was wonderful to work with when it came to design and finishing touches and I am so thankful for her expertise.

The process took a bit longer than anticipated but it was worth the wait.
